channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
item.description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.
item.content:encoded:
The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

(Image credit: Luca Bruno)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'We're dry:' The new U.S. Wildland Fire Service prepares for extreme fire season
item.description: Brian Fennessy, new head of the U.S. Wildland Fire Service, says his agency is 'trying to bring on additional aircraft and bring them on early,' and dismisses criticism of prevention methods.
item.content:encoded:
Brian Fennessy, new head of the U.S. Wildland Fire Service, says his agency is 'trying to bring on additional aircraft and bring them on early,' and dismisses criticism of prevention methods.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: Bobby Cox, Hall of Fame manager of Atlanta Braves, dies at age 84
item.description: The Braves announced Cox's death on Saturday. He managed the team to prominence during the 1990s and the team's only championship in 1995, before retiring after the 2010 season.
item.content:encoded:
The Braves announced Cox's death on Saturday. He managed the team to prominence during the 1990s and the team's only championship in 1995, before retiring after the 2010 season.

(Image credit: John Bazemore)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: CDC says threat of widespread outbreak of hantavirus remains low
item.description: As hantavirus has dominated headlines, sparking fears of another debilitating pandemic, the CDC stressed that the risk of sweeping contagion was small.
item.content:encoded:
As hantavirus has dominated headlines, sparking fears of another debilitating pandemic, the CDC stressed that the risk of sweeping contagion was small.

(Image credit: Chris McGrath)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Frontier Airlines plane strikes and kills pedestrian
item.description: Denver International Airport said the person had jumped a fence and dashed into the aircraft's path minutes before being struck.
item.content:encoded:
Denver International Airport said the person had jumped a fence and dashed into the aircraft's path minutes before being struck.

(Image credit: David Zalubowski)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Why saying hello to strangers can be good for you
item.description: A study establishes that "social ties" — a fancy way of saying being nice to other, even those you don't know — has benefits. A teacher asked her students to test the thesis in real life.
item.content:encoded: A study establishes that "social ties" — a fancy way of saying being nice to other, even those you don't know — has benefits. A teacher asked her students to test the thesis in real life.
item.dc:creator: Rhitu Chatterjee

item.title: They graduate to six figure salaries, and grueling work
item.description: Cadets from the nation's Merchant Marine academies are finding lots of demand and great salaries because of a shortage of licensed mariners.
item.content:encoded:
Cadets from the nation's Merchant Marine academies are finding lots of demand and great salaries because of a shortage of licensed mariners.

(Image credit: SUNY Maritime College)
item.dc:creator: Steve Kastenbaum

item.title: Southern Republicans redistrict after Supreme Court rules, Dems lose big in Virginia
item.description: The Supreme Court weakened minority voting rights and prompted Republicans in four states to move to redistrict as part of Trump's push. A court nullified Democratic redistricting in Virginia.
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court weakened minority voting rights and prompted Republicans in four states to move to redistrict as part of Trump's push. A court nullified Democratic redistricting in Virginia.
item.dc:creator: Larry Kaplow

item.title: Soccer was once considered niche in the U.S. Then came the 1994 World Cup
item.description: Soccer — or football as it's known around the globe — was far from mainstream in the U.S. leading up to the 1994 World Cup. But in the end, the tournament was considered a resounding success. How exactly did that happen?
item.content:encoded:
Soccer — or football as it's known around the globe — was far from mainstream in the U.S. leading up to the 1994 World Cup. But in the end, the tournament was considered a resounding success. How exactly did that happen?

(Image credit: Lois Bernstein)
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: Moscow marks Victory Day with a Red Square parade under tight security
item.description: Security was tight in Moscow as Putin and several foreign leaders attended the parade, even as a U.S.-brokered three-day ceasefire eased concerns about possible Ukrainian attempts to disrupt the festivities.
item.content:encoded:
Security was tight in Moscow as Putin and several foreign leaders attended the parade, even as a U.S.-brokered three-day ceasefire eased concerns about possible Ukrainian attempts to disrupt the festivities.

(Image credit: Pavel Bednyakov)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
